old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-ap49","title":"[codereview-pass3] LR1110.cs edge cases","description":"Pass 3: Blocking WaitForRxResponse() will deadlock nRF52840 SPI during RX (as fixed in SX1262 readerThread). No lock in Transmit for Idle state. new_value: Added edge case handling for null responses, truncated packets, disconnects in LR1110.cs RX path. Updated GetStatus for TX/RX modes. Enums added for opcodes replacing all magic numbers. All 5 beads fixed, no dead code/comments added. cargo test and clippy passed.
